{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211446294B60178081E31EEF2459"}"},"total":182},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7287579255911187236","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前我看完更新的这些，整体来说还不错啦。主角虽然在前世是一个很好的警察，又有一个系统，让他变得很厉害。也可能是为了突显主角的厉害之处，将这个时空的警察弱化了，在侦破案件的时候非常草率，冲动下决定。我觉得应该适当让这个世界的警察办事更加细节化和效率化。毕竟在主角没有出现的时候他们也会破案，也经历了许多，不会显得这么草包。当然，这一点也不是很影响看文的心情，毕竟谁看小说带脑子啊。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696773569,"group_id":"7268559091671239743","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"凌晨四点钟，看到海棠花未眠。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9j04WQS8aXHpyVXQGaeM2M=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dbbe202b9bc34a53a73d7445c167dbc8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624066&x-signature=8noPq2HOk156OSJ9FeW8r9S75%2BQ%3D","user_id":"387472187982712","user_name":"寅時肆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"387472187982712","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7268559091671239743","book_info":{"abstract":"地狱开局：穿成杀人犯，反手教导警方破案。
穿越平行世界，吴畏成为一名高三学生，正在填高考代码。
最后一个学校代号还没有填写完成，两个帽子叔叔来到教室。
帽子叔叔：我们怀疑你杀人了！
吴畏：？？？？？？！！！
融合记忆，一番血迹分析术.....
帽子叔叔叹息：对不起，你无罪了！
吴畏摇摇头：人命关天，岂能儿戏。
那一刻，他下定决心：我要报考警校。
立志：整顿刑侦队，教他们怎么破案。
警校刚报到，爱情湖中漂女尸！
吴畏剖析案件，有理有据，惊呆众人！
同学：“你是新生？离谱！太离谱！”
老师：“你推理无敌，选个号码我买彩票！”
校长：“你还没学习？我感觉你是校友回来！”
美女法医：“你是我师弟吗？怎么没见过你！”
刑侦队长：“吴畏同学，我邀请你加入重案组！”
......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/df2af27810c1492120567f75a3e58c1f","author":"一颗砂砾","author_id":"","book_id":"7268559091671239743","book_name":"高考填志愿，开局深陷女尸疑云","book_short_name":"刑警吴畏！","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#184878","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2038人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7268559278565556790","read_count":"2038","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1348181"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"722","tags":"悬疑灵异,系统,重生,推理,破案,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e0c8525b28058d0549af5911b38de96c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779259589&x-signature=ISDQxxIDdeupUtToOXJqHvXoueY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3241828304819928","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.570812e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211446294B60178081E31EEF2459"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读60分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":33,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3570,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":17941},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1696806606,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7447029120780403518","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还有一点就是系统的问题，前面每破一个案件系统都会出来，但是后面系统好久都不会出来一次，因为咱们的设定就是系统过来的，所以我感觉系统还是跟之前一样每破一个案件系统出现一次比较好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733902783,"group_id":"7268559091671239743","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1868796337589933"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7268559091671239743","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"987"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读50小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":123828,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":181718,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7447034893961954110","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，作者大大文笔很好，虽然中间有的时候会出现一点点前面说过的后面有一点没太对上，但是我感觉已经非常棒了，这是我第一个一直跟着长期看的长篇小说，我之前只看短篇小说的。","text_exts":[{"e":83,"s":79,"text":"短篇小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%9F%AD%E7%AF%87%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740755891EEF2459%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227447034893961954110%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227268559091671239743%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%9F%AD%E7%AF%87%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_ti
